prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day prediction window on QCOM, I used typical stock volatility patterns assuming an annualized volatility of ~30% for tech stocks. The point estimate remains at current price assuming no directional bias. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with daily volatility of ~1.9%, scaled for 6 days. The intervals widen appropriately for higher confidence levels, reflecting increased uncertainty over the prediction horizon.
